name: Scalar 8-bit early fields
notes: Date, seed/feed counts, selected tool, stamina and misc flags.

name: Active/latest-slot marker byte
notes: Temporarily zeroed for checksum; values 0/1 are used by slot-state flow.

name: Save checksum
notes: 16-bit additive checksum over $0000-$0FFF with $002E and $002F-$0030 zeroed first.

name: FARM signature
notes: ASCII F,A,R,M. Used as a basic slot validity marker.

name: 16-bit counters/hearts/family/dog state
notes: Wood/grass, crop totals, bachelorette hearts, persistent flags, dog position, happiness, pregnancy/kids.

name: Tool shed bitfields
notes: Rows of stored tools/seeds/items; see pass07 report.
